LanguageData.CE_Gunpowder.label: gunpowder
LanguageData.CE_Gunpowder.description: Craft early muzzle loading weapons and black powder ammunition.

CE_Gunpowder.generalRules.rulesStrings.li: subject_story->revolutionized warfare on a medieval world
subject_story->stumbled across explosive powder while conducting alchemical experiments
subject_story->was revered by a tribe for the act of creating thunder

LanguageData.CE_Launchers.label: simple launchers
LanguageData.CE_Launchers.description: Allows for the production of basic grenade and rocket launchers.

CE_Launchers.generalRules.rulesStrings.li: subject_story->developed weapons to defeat heavily armored foes
subject_story->toiled in an urbworld munitions factory
subject_story->narrowly survived an assault by mechanoids and vowed to stop such attacks

LanguageData.CE_AdvancedLaunchers.label: advanced launchers
LanguageData.CE_AdvancedLaunchers.description: Allows for the production of more advanced launchers and munitions such as incendiary, triple rocket, and doomsday launchers, as well as thermobaric and time-fuzed projectiles.

CE_AdvancedLaunchers.generalRules.rulesS.li: subject_story->explored an enormous blast crater on a toxic world

LanguageData.CE_AdvancedAmmo.label: advanced ammunition
LanguageData.CE_AdvancedAmmo.description: Allows for the production of advanced ammunition for small arms and light weapons systems like armor-piercing incendiary, sabot, and high-explosive rounds.

CE_AdvancedAmmo.generalRules.rulesString.li: subject_story->stumbled across a cache of advanced weapons
subject_story->learned to use a discarding sabot to defeat powered armor
subject_story->worked for a prolific arms dealer
subject_story->studied the aftermath of a mechanoid assault

LanguageData.CE_SimpleNV.label: basic optoelectronics
LanguageData.CE_SimpleNV.description: Allows for the production of simple electro-optical devices, like night vision goggles and reflex sights.

CE_SimpleNV.generalRules.rulesStrings.li: subject_story->worked on developing basic light sensors
subject_story->took part in military field testing on a war-world
subject_story->instructed early midworld soldiers in night combat

LanguageData.CE_AdvancedNV.label: advanced optoelectronics
LanguageData.CE_AdvancedNV.description: Allows for the production of more advanced and specialized electro-optical devices, including better night vision goggles and advanced digital optics.

CE_AdvancedNV.generalRules.rulesStrings.li: subject_story->meticulously studied the sensors of destroyed mechanoids
subject_story->uncovered an ancient cryosleep crypt containing stores of advanced armor
subject_story->was trained as a scout in the military of an urbworld
subject_story->worked in a military prototyping lab
